title: Truly-unsimulatable Regent/Colorless cards (excluded from training/estimation deck sets)

source.method: estimate-floor8-play-values -> excludedForms, kept only forms whose reasons contain 'Unsupported simulation action ...' or 'Generic calculated damage scaling requires manual review'
source.regenerateCommand: dotnet run --project CardValueOverlay.Tools -- estimate-floor8-play-values --deck-source history-analysis/data/dashen_77_all_231_decks.json --deck-group floor8 --deck-count 1 --limit-decks 1 --limit-forms 400 --runs 20 --max-branch 2 --output-json <out.json> ; then filter excludedForms.reasons for 'Unsupported simulation action' / 'requires manual review'

note: These cards cannot be valued by the simulator under EITHER strategy (source-credit or play-delta): unsupported action, unsupported Power, or unsupported calculated-scaling. Decks containing any of them are excluded from training/estimation deck sets because their value would be mis-computed. This list is VERSION-DEPENDENT and will GROW or SHRINK as simulator support for powers/actions/scaling is added or removed; regenerate it from the eligibility engine after any simulator or game-version change. NOTE: cards excluded only for 'Attribution incomplete' (draw/createCard/selectCards/moveCardBetweenPiles/transformCard/autoPlay/...) are NOT listed here - they remain simulatable and are valued via the play-delta strategy.

reasons: Unsupported simulation action 'power' from DynamicVar + PowerCmd.Apply<MonarchsGazePower>.
Unsupported simulation action 'power' from DynamicVar + PowerCmd.Apply<NoBlockPower>.
Generic calculated damage scaling requires manual review.
Unsupported simulation action 'scalingDamage' from ExtraDamageVar + CalculatedDamageVar.
Upgraded: Generic calculated damage scaling requires manual review.
Unsupported simulation action 'power' from DynamicVar + PowerCmd.Apply<TheGambitPower>.
